name: MegaChad
description: Burn-to-create looksmaxxing engine on MegaETH. Burn $MEGACHAD tokens to generate AI-enhanced portraits, mint NFTs, and earn on-chain reputation.

skills.name: Get Swap Quote
skills.description: Get a live swap quote and transaction parameters for buying $MEGACHAD with ETH via Kumbaya DEX on MegaETH. Returns router address, calldata, and slippage-adjusted minimum output.
examples: How much $MEGACHAD can I get for 0.1 ETH?
Get a swap quote for buying MEGACHAD

skills.name: Looksmaxx
skills.description: Burn 225,000 $MEGACHAD tokens and pay 1 USDm via x402 to generate an AI-enhanced portrait and mint it as an NFT. Requires two on-chain burn transactions and a base64-encoded portrait image.
examples: Burn MEGACHAD tokens and create an AI portrait NFT

skills.name: Get Token Stats
skills.description: Get current $MEGACHAD token statistics including total supply, circulating supply, tokens burned, and total burn count.
examples: What are the current MEGACHAD token stats?
How many tokens have been burned?

skills.name: Get Gallery
skills.description: Browse recent looksmaxxed burns with IPFS image URLs, burner addresses, and timestamps. Supports pagination.
examples: Get the latest burns from the gallery

skills.name: Get Chadboard
skills.description: Get the burner leaderboard ranked by total burns. Includes ERC-8004 reputation scores, .mega domain names, profile info, and all looksmaxxed images per burner.
examples: Who are the top MEGACHAD burners?

skills.name: Register for Early Access
skills.description: Register a wallet address for MegaChad testnet beta access. Requires a wallet address that holds $MEGACHAD tokens or looksmaxxed NFTs. Optionally include a referral code.
examples: Sign up for MegaChad beta testing
Register my wallet for early access
